nodes.label: AI as writing assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or insufficient collaborator

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI for actual writing or final output
nodes.grounding_span: I will use AI to help brainstorm ideas and especially for outlining

nodes.label: AI as quick reference for literacy knowledge
nodes.label_negative: AI literacy as separate or unnecessary
nodes.grounding_span: AI literacy as an extension of the info literacy work we are already doing

nodes.label: Openness about AI use with colleagues
nodes.grounding_span: I'm pretty open to exploring different aspects of AI

nodes.label: AI as tool for critical thinking about AI
nodes.grounding_span: apply a critical and skeptical lens on AI tool

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI chatbots will just make up citations or provide way too generic information

nodes.label: AI for data analysis
nodes.grounding_span: I haven't used an AI for data analysis

nodes.label: Professional efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: That's hands down my least favorite part of writing, so having access to AI to help collate my thoughts and put it all together is super helpful

nodes.label: Critical thinking and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: teaching users how to use the tools and apply a critical lens on the outputs

nodes.label: Research integrity and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I'd have to double check all the outputs anyway

nodes.label: Professional growth and skill maintenance
nodes.grounding_span: how to continue advancing my own search skills, but also like--can I work on the next step of the search

nodes.label: Hesitation toward AI for data analysis
Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely see it becoming more integrated in my work

nodes.label: Empowerment from workplace culture
nodes.grounding_span: I've been more empowered to explore different tools

nodes.label: Critical evaluation across all information sources
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to take the same view with AI--just because a AI can generate content, doesn't necessarily make it good or useful
